name: control_volume
description: Get or set system volume levels for different sound types (system, notification, alarm, ringtone, media, call, voip).

action.description: 'get' to read current volumes, 'set' to change volume

sound_type.description: Sound type to control (for 'set' action): system, notification, alarm, ringtone, media, call, voip

volume.description: Volume level to set (for 'set' action, 0 to max)
